LogIn.description: Log in to continue to AtHome.
LogIn.emailRequiredForPasswordReset: Provide an email to reset your password.
LogIn.passwordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters and must not contain spaces.
LogIn.resetPasswordRequestFallbackMessage: Could not request a password reset.
LogIn.resetPasswordRequestSuccess: If the account exists, a password reset link has been sent.
LogIn.title: Log in

Register.description: Sign up to continue to AtHome.
Register.passwordHint: Password must be at least 8 characters and must not contain spaces.
Register.resendDescription: Already registered, but did not receive the email?
Register.resendSuccess: If the account exists and is not verified, a new email has been sent.
Register.success: Check your email for further instructions.
Register.title: Register

ResetPassword.description: Enter the new password you want to use for your account.
ResetPassword.missingToken: The password reset link is missing or invalid.
ResetPassword.passwordHint: The password must contain at least 8 characters.
ResetPassword.success: Your password has been changed successfully.
ResetPassword.title: Create a new password

HomePage.description: Explore properties for sale and rent, connect with agents, and discover the right home for you.
HomePage.title: Find your place to call home

errors.string_too_long: {field} must be at most {max_length} characters long.
errors.string_too_short: {field} must be at least {min_length} characters long.
